arts.ttl: 'Far too soft': France's media criticise £45m Arsenal player after PSG knock them out of the Champions League
arts.sum: Ahead of Arsenal’s second leg against Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League, Thomas Partey was being billed as the difference-maker. Partey was suspended in the...

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique can't resist sarcastic Premier League jibe after PSG's win over Arsenal
arts.sum: Luis Enrique managed to add another Premier League scalp to his growing collection as PSG reached the Champions League final by beating Arsenal and the Spaniard was not afraid to have some fun after the final whistle

arts.ttl: 'Hesitant': French media spotted something really strange about William Saliba's display for Arsenal vs PSG
Arsenal’s Champions League dream over after semi-final defeat to PSG
arts.sum: The Parisians eased to a 3-1 aggregate victory.
